violations.text: No person certified in food safety was present as needed at the time of inspection. There is to be an individual, certified in food safety at all times, when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 12/19/2024

The quaternary ammonium concentration in the sanitizing solution of the 3-bay sink was less than 100 parts per million (ppm). According to the manufacturer's use directions, the concentration of the quaternary ammonium must be 200 to 400 ppm. Sanitizer solution was properly adjusted at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/19/2024

Single service items were not being stored properly in their original protective package and/or stored inverted to prevent contamination. Single service items were rearranged for proper storage at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/19/2024

The following non-food contact surfaces of the were observed to have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris... - Shelving rack surfaces - The hood vent metal filters - cookline equipment surfaces - Magnetic clean knife storage rack Non-FOOD-CONTACT SURFACES of EQUIPMENT shall be cleaned at a frequency necessary to preclude accumulation of soil residues. New Violation. Correct By: 12/31/2024

The condensate/drain line from the soft serve machine unit is draining into the 3 bay sink. Condensate drainage and other non-sewage liquids must drain into a drain. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/19/2025

The floor/walls under and behind equipment were observed to have an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 01/15/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (vegetable slicer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Slicer to be washed rinsed and sanitized prior to use. New Violation. Correct By: 09/21/2023
The cover to the freezer in the dry storage area is in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 10/05/2023
The non-food contact surfaces of the knife holder have an accumulation of food residue. New Violation. Correct By: 09/21/2023
The condensate from the refrigeration unit is draining into the 3-bay sink. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. New Violation. Correct By: 10/05/2023
